name: Lead Stack Media
description_short: Lead Stack Media is a performance marketing network connecting consumers with personal loan, credit card, and insurance offers from multiple providers.
description_long: Lead Stack Media operates as a performance-based marketing platform that connects consumers with financial product offers. Their network includes personal loans, credit cards, insurance, and other financial services, using advanced matching technology to pair consumers with suitable offers.
affiliate_program: Performance-based payouts for personal loans, credit cards, and insurance leads
pros: Up to 90% commission on leads — highest revenue share available
Multiple payout methods: bank wire, PayPal, ACH transfer
Real-time tracking and campaign optimization tools
Direct network of personal loan and payday loan lenders
cons: Affiliate program only — you must generate your own traffic
Minimum $500 balance required to unlock weekly payouts
Earnings depend on approved leads, not applications alone
Subject to lender approval and fraud/quality requirements
Competitive affiliate space — conversion rates vary widely
diagnosis: High-commission loan affiliate platform. Offers personal loans and payday loans with 90% revenue share. Serves publishers/marketers, not direct loan seekers.
